description: Management establishes, with board oversight, structures, reporting lines, and appropriate authorities and responsibilities in the pursuit of objectives.

subcriteria.name: org_structure
subcriteria.reference_text: Organizational chart showing reporting lines, management hierarchy, and functional areas including engineering, security, operations, and compliance. Updated periodically to reflect team changes.

subcriteria.name: job_descriptions
subcriteria.reference_text: Written job descriptions defining roles, responsibilities, required qualifications, and reporting relationships. Employees acknowledge their job description upon hire or role change. Security responsibilities included where applicable.

subcriteria.name: segregation_of_duties
subcriteria.reference_text: Segregation of duties documented showing incompatible functions are separated. Developers cannot deploy to production. Finance approvals require dual authorization. Access administration separated from audit.

subcriteria.name: external_party_roles
subcriteria.reference_text: Roles and responsibilities for interacting with external parties such as vendors, customers, and regulators are defined. Business associate agreements include security commitments and obligations.

mismatch_signals.reason: Security monitoring tools are not organizational structure evidence.
Business continuity infrastructure is not org structure evidence.
